## 🚨 SECURITY VULNERABILITY REPORT

**⚠️ IMPORTANT**: This template is for internal security reporting only.
For responsible disclosure, please email security@helpchain.live instead.

## 🔒 Vulnerability Details

### Type of Vulnerability
- [ ] Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
- [ ] Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
- [ ] SQL Injection
- [ ] Authentication Bypass
- [ ] Authorization Bypass
- [ ] Information Disclosure
- [ ] Remote Code Execution
- [ ] Denial of Service
- [ ] Other: __________

### Severity (CVSS Score if known)
- [ ] Critical (9.0-10.0)
- [ ] High (7.0-8.9)
- [ ] Medium (4.0-6.9)
- [ ] Low (0.1-3.9)
- [ ] Info (0.0)

## 📍 Location
- **URL/Endpoint**: [e.g., https://helpchain.live/admin_login]
- **File/Function**: [e.g., backend/appy.py:admin_login()]
- **Component**: [e.g., Authentication, File Upload, API]

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. [Detailed step-by-step reproduction]
2. [Include any required credentials/tokens]
3. [Specify user role required]

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- **Confidentiality**: [None/Low/Medium/High]
- **Integrity**: [None/Low/Medium/High]
- **Availability**: [None/Low/Medium/High]

### Affected Users
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Authenticated users only
- [ ] Admin users only
- [ ] Specific user groups

```bash
# Include PoC code/commands here
# DO NOT include actual exploits
```
